fragility_points: Short-horizon BTC volatility can erase the current buffer without an extraordinary catalyst.
The contract is point-in-time, so even a generally bullish path can still resolve No.
key_assumptions: Recent Binance strength is durable enough to keep BTC/USDT above 72000 through the April 16 noon ET minute.
Binance kline data is a strong verification proxy for the Binance chart surface named in the rules.
main_logical_chain: Contract resolves from one exact Binance BTC/USDT 1-minute close at April 16 noon ET, so exchange, pair, timezone, and strict threshold all matter.
Direct Binance data shows BTC/USDT is currently above 72000 by a few thousand dollars at the relevant comparison minute.
Recent same-time failures below 72000 show the threshold is active but not secure, so near-certainty is not justified.
That supports a Yes lean but at materially lower confidence than the 90%-91% market price.
main_thesis: Yes is more likely than No because BTC/USDT is already above 72000 on Binance, but the market overstates certainty for a volatile exact-minute threshold test.
quote_anchors: Same reference point was below 72,000 on April 12 and April 13.
source_quality_view: Good direct evidence for mechanics and current level, with low-to-medium source-of-truth ambiguity but only medium evidence independence.
strongest_disconfirmers: The same noon-ET-equivalent reference point was below 72000 on April 12 and April 13.
A roughly 4.7% cushion is meaningful but not decisive over a 47-hour horizon for BTC.
strongest_supports: April 14 noon-ET-equivalent Binance 1-minute close was 75356.48, comfortably above the threshold.
Recent daily and noon-reference prints show BTC has entered a stronger low-to-mid 70k regime.
timing_relevance: Resolution depends on the April 16, 2026 12:00 PM ET candle, which corresponds to 16:00 UTC during daylight saving time.
unresolved_ambiguities: Rules name the Binance chart interface as source of truth, while verification used Binance API data from the same venue.
No independent secondary exchange-specific chart source was used beyond direct Binance data and the Polymarket rules surface.
what_would_change_view: I would raise confidence if BTC stays above roughly 74k-75k through April 15 and lower it materially if Binance loses 72k and cannot reclaim it before the final 24 hours.
